data.content: Help me set up the deployment pipeline for our new service
I'll help you set up a CI/CD pipeline. Let me look at your current infrastructure...
Use GitHub Actions with a deploy to ECS Fargate

data.summary: User is setting up a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions deploying to ECS Fargate. We discussed the workflow structure: build → test → deploy to staging → manual approval → deploy to production. The Dockerfile is at /app/Dockerfile, the service runs on port 8080. ECS cluster name is 'prod-cluster' in us-east-1. Task definition uses 512 CPU / 1024 MB memory. Still need to configure the IAM role for GitHub Actions OIDC federation.

data.content: The IAM role is set up now. Let's write the workflow file.
Here's the complete workflow file for .github/workflows/deploy.yml...

data.summary: Completed the GitHub Actions workflow for ECS Fargate deployment. The pipeline does: build Docker image, push to ECR, deploy to ECS. IAM OIDC role configured for GitHub Actions. Workflow file at .github/workflows/deploy.yml. Service port 8080, cluster 'prod-cluster' in us-east-1, 512/1024 task definition. Added health check endpoint at /health. Next steps: add staging environment workflow and configure auto-scaling policies.
